# Session: 2025-09-04

Maxim looks over the water and hears a chuckle.  
Maxim finds himself in a memory of his childhood. He is in a school with electrified cages for cloned children.  
A loudspeaker announced “Begin Test 4\. Only 2 children from each group are walking away.” One of the kids, the girl “number 2”, asks what is going on. The kids are confused and so is Maxim.  
One of the kids complains but gets too close to the fence and is electrocuted to death.  
The loudspeaker announces they have 20 minutes and fighting breaks out as the kids start killing each other.  
Maxim grapples the kid next to him and immolates him with fire.

He hears: “Perfect” and the vision returns to the boat in the Godsway.  
The past is never the past, it isn’t gone yet.  
Alisha recommends not looking into the water as Maxim snaps at her.

We are on fresh water.   
Alisha gets close to the mast and scratches something with her knife- she’s doing a prayer to her god.  
Zinjaro decides to do similar- he uses the Alchemy Jug to pour out a gallon of wine. He says a few words but otherwise relaxes quietly.

A fire lizard shows up and Zinjaro offers him wine even though he doesn’t initially recognize him.  
He chats like he knows Zinjaro- it’s Sol’Ar\! Zinjaro is super excited, he speaks so much more clearly and looks amazing as a lizard.  
Sol’Ar talks about how hard it sometimes is to reach the material world.  
He notices Alisha but says that’s not Luna she’s praying to- it’s all cold.  
He touches Zinjaro’s holy symbol and it grows warm. He downs half the alchemy job and disappears.  
Zinjaro grows more powerful and receives “The Solar Gift”. He is now immune to the Frightened condition.

![][image11]

Zinjaro wanders close to Alisha to look at the symbol she is praying to.  
The symbol is very plain, almost fake. It’s made of silver, but like it was made hastily.  
Ogra wanders over and Zinjaro offers him wine and bananas.  
He tells him his suspicion that Alisha isn’t praying to Luna.

We fade to another memory.  
We see corpses of humans and demons.  
Alisha is in the field, she is covered in blood. Her father is beside her.   
“That could have gone better. But we’re alive and that’s what matters.”  
A dragon descends down to the battlefield.  
They are confused: “They corrupted a dragon?\!”  
Her father sends her back to camp. His name is Arvin the Dragonslayer. He clicks his boots and flies to the air.   
Alisha runs back to camp. A figure appears beside her, offering everything she wants as long as she swears.  
Alisha sees her father swallowed whole. She takes a moment, and swears on everything. “Give me the power and I’ll rip every demon until the princes of Hell are before me.” Her brunette hair turns blonde.  
The dragon flies away as does the woman. She cries as the weight of her oath dawns on her.

Ogra and Brambleberry sense the ship grazed something; something big. Ogra sees a large dark shadow under the boat- it’s bigger than the boat. The shadow seems to be going in the same direction as the ship.

Alisha goes to the front of the ship and calls Aolis over. They see a drow in the water that drifts closer. Aolis recognizes them but says we shouldn’t help them. Towards the back of the ship, another figure appears- a little girl (number 2). It drifts away.

The ship stops and we all notice the shadow underneath getting larger.  
Alisha’s dad appears in the water and tells her everything will be fine soon.  
The monster emerges from the water- it’s a Nightmare Hydra.  
We make wisdom saving throws against a type of fear effect (which is not the same as frightened). Only Thadius and Zinjaro make the check (Zinjaro feels a lizard hand, saying “I told you I got you”), everyone else has Absolute Terror.

Absolute Terror- incapacitated, for each round you need to make a WIS saving throw. Continuing to fail means you start taking psychic damage. An ally can use an action to try to snap them out of them (Persuasion/Intimidation), reducing the number of stacks of AT.

It’s boss fight time\!

![][image12]
